task_summary: Implemented LEMONADE_API_KEY support across all Lemonade-bound HTTP call sites in GAIA (LemonadeClient, LemonadeProvider, VLMClient, UI routers, chat helpers, server startup, base agent health probe). 25 new TDD tests. PR #1149.
mistakes: Patched gaia.llm.vlm_client.LemonadeClient instead of gaia.llm.lemonade_client.LemonadeClient — deferred imports require patching at source module
assertLogs('gaia') does not escalate child logger levels; had to manually setLevel on the child logger
Forgot to mock _ensure_model_loaded in 401 retry test — it makes its own network calls that triggered model loading
Initial draft missed 7 httpx call sites in _chat_helpers.py, server.py, and agents/base/agent.py — caught by code-reviewer agent

learnings.trigger: Patching a class used via deferred import (import inside __init__ or method body)
learnings.insight: Patch at the SOURCE module where the symbol is defined, not the importing module. gaia.llm.vlm_client.LemonadeClient doesn't exist at module level; patch gaia.llm.lemonade_client.LemonadeClient instead.

learnings.trigger: Testing DEBUG log messages with assertLogs
learnings.insight: assertLogs('logger_name') does not force child loggers to DEBUG level. Manually set logging.getLogger('child.path').setLevel(logging.DEBUG) before the assertLogs context, restore in finally.

learnings.trigger: Testing SSE-generating methods (pull_model, load_model) with responses library
learnings.insight:
Mock body must be a complete SSE event ending with 

 (e.g. b'event: complete
data: {}

'), and test must consume with next() not full iteration to prevent iter_lines() from blocking forever.

learnings.trigger: Testing chat_completions or completions error paths in LemonadeClient
learnings.insight: _ensure_model_loaded makes its own network calls (get_status -> list_models). Always mock it (@patch('...LemonadeClient._ensure_model_loaded')) when testing error-response paths to prevent spurious model load side effects.
create_lemonade_client() factory at the bottom of lemonade_client.py must be updated to accept and forward the new param — it's a separate entry point used by CLI callers.

learnings.trigger: Catching OpenAI auth errors in Lemonade streaming paths
learnings.insight: openai.AuthenticationError is NOT a subclass of openai.APIError in openai>=1.0. Catch it in a separate branch BEFORE the generic except(openai.APIError, ...) tuple. Never include str(e) — SDK may stringify the Authorization header.

learnings.trigger: 401 error handling in any GAIA HTTP call to Lemonade
learnings.insight: Never include response.text in a 401 error message — misconfigured proxies can reflect the Authorization header back in the body, leaking the API key. Use a fixed-string message naming the env var instead.

learnings.trigger: Looking for GAIA env var file to add new env vars
learnings.insight: docs/.env.example is a Mintlify/docs-proxy config file, NOT GAIA env vars. GAIA env var documentation goes in .env.example at the repo root only.

learnings.trigger: Adding module-level imports from gaia.llm.* to agents/base/agent.py
learnings.insight: The base Agent class deliberately keeps all gaia.llm.lemonade_client imports DEFERRED inside try: blocks in methods. This preserves the LLM-backend-agnostic layering invariant. Never add module-level imports from gaia.llm.* to this file.
